title: Enchant Limits
description: Create Limits for all types of enchants from vanilla to custom ones!
body:
# Enchant Limits Enchant Limits offers a sophisticated solution for server administrators to manage and restrict enchantment levels on their servers. It provides a robust system for enforcing limits, complete with a user-friendly GUI and customizable feedback options. ## Features * **Precise Enchantment Control**: Define maximum levels for any vanilla or custom enchantment globally or individually. * **Interactive Admin GUI**: A categorized, intuitive interface (`/elimit`) for managing limits without editing config files manually. * **Flexible Warning System**: choose between Action Bar or Chat notifications when an item's enchantment is scaled down. * **Smart Conflict Resolution**: Automatically detects conflicting plugins like "ItemLimiter" and adjusts warning locations to prevent overlaps. * **Bypass Permissions**: Grant specific players or ranks the ability to bypass enchantment limits. * **Customizable Feedback**: Fully configurable messages with MiniMessage support, allowing for gradients and rich text. * **Audio Feedback**: Integrated sound effects for limit enforcement and UI interactions. ## Commands * `/elimit` (Aliases: `/enchantlimit`, `/elimits`) * Opens the Enchantment Limits Admin GUI to view and modify settings. ## Permissions * `enchantlimit.admin` * Grants access to the Admin GUI and management commands. (Default: OP) * `enchantlimit.bypass.*` * Allows the player to bypass all configured enchantment limits. (Default: OP) ## Installation 1. Download the latest `EnchantLimits.jar`. 2. Ensuring your server is running a compatible version (1.21+). 3. Place the jar file into the server's `plugins` directory. 4. Restart the server. ## Support For assistance, bug reports, or suggestions, please visit our Discord server or website. **Discord**: [https://discord.gg/zyvDgFQk](https://discord.gg/zyvDgFQk) **Website**: [https://Piston.the-best.uk](https://Piston.the-best.uk)
**Developed by**: thebestharrison / Logix / VexorCore
